columns.name: Findings
columns.description: A Dynamic array of all the findings associated with the resource.

columns.name: FindingsResource
columns.description: A Dynamic array of the resource that was affected by the security finding.

columns.name: _IsBillable
columns.description: Specifies whether ingesting the data is billable. When _IsBillable isfalseingestion isn't billed to your Azure account

columns.name: SourceProperties
columns.description: A map of additional properties about the source of the security finding.

columns.name: SourceSystem
columns.description: The type of agent the event was collected by. For example,OpsManagerfor Windows agent, either direct connect or Operations Manager,Linuxfor all Linux agents, orAzurefor Azure Diagnostics

columns.name: TimeGenerated
columns.description: The time at which the security finding was first detected.
